name: yuki
description: 雪 — a snowflake is a letter from the sky. From a seed, the sky's weather (temperature and supersaturation) sets the crystal habit, and Reiter's hexagonal cellular automaton grows the flake: vapor diffuses, freezes at the rim, and a six-fold flower unfolds on its own. No randomness draws the form; the seed only chooses the day's sky. Exactly six-fold symmetric (the core guarantees it bit-for-bit). Zero dependencies, offline, deterministic.
